name: unraid-mcp
description: Read-only MCP server for Unraid homelab servers — query array health, Docker containers, VMs, metrics, and more.

interface.shortDescription: Query Unraid array, Docker, VMs, and system metrics
interface.longDescription: Read-only MCP server that bridges Claude to the Unraid GraphQL API. Exposes 24 actions covering array health and capacity, Docker container state and logs, virtual machines, system info, CPU/memory/temperature metrics, UPS status, log files, plugins, parity history, remote access, and more. All operations are safe to run — nothing is modified.
defaultPrompt: What is my Unraid array status and how much space is used?
List all running Docker containers on my Unraid server.
Show me the current CPU, memory, and temperature metrics for my Unraid system.
